title: cedrus patula
intro: Cedrus patula, also known as the Atlas Cedar, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree native to the Atlas Mountains in Morocco. The Atlas Cedar has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cedrus patula include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory issues, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of Cedrus patula include essential oils, teas, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being, as well as to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
